title: Thelypteris malodora
taxonomy: Thelypteris malodora is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of deciduous and evergreen ferns. The family Thelypteridaceae is a part of the larger group Polypodiales, which includes many species of ferns. The genus Thelypteris is further divided into several species, each with unique characteristics. Thelypteris malodora is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
